title: crotalaria lanceolata
intro: Crotalaria lanceolata, also known as lance-leaved rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria lanceolata include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and easing respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
